card1.title: Evaluation Criteria
card1.description: Clear and understandable criteria help students understand what is being assessed and how to achieve better results.

card2.title: Process Transparency
card2.description: Every stage of assessment is open to students and parents — without hidden requirements or subjective decisions.

card3.title: Feedback
card3.description: Regular and constructive feedback motivates students to improve their knowledge and skills.

item1.title: Professional Courses
item1.description: Modern training programs that help teachers master new methodologies and improve the quality of education.

item2.title: Seminars and Workshops
item2.description: Hands-on sessions for sharing experience, where educators refine their skills and discover new ideas for lessons.

item3.title: Mentoring
item3.description: Individual support from experienced colleagues that helps teachers adapt faster and grow in their profession.

item4.title: Certification
item4.description: Official confirmation of professional level that opens new opportunities for career growth.

teacher.title: Primary School Teacher
teacher.school: Krasnopillia Lyceum of Berezan Municipal Council
teacher.education: Mykolaiv National University named after V. O. Sukhomlynsky, 2008
teacher.workplace: Krasnopillia Lyceum of Berezan Municipal Council
teacher.qualification: Specialist of the highest category, senior teacher
teacher.methodicalProblem: Development of cross-cutting skills in primary school students of the New Ukrainian School
teacher.intro:
Welcome to the website of

Irina Petrovna Bilyk,

a primary school teacher at Krasnopillia Lyceum of Berezan Municipal Council.

I'm glad to see you!
teacher.pedagogicalIdeaIntro: In modern conditions of educational reform, the development of cross-cutting skills becomes particularly important, as they form the basis for key competencies in learners.
teacher.pedagogicalIdea: The pedagogical idea of 'Development of cross-cutting skills in primary school students' aims to teach children to think critically, work in teams, communicate effectively, solve problems, engage in lifelong learning, and use ICT in educational and everyday activities.
teacher.crossSkillsIntro: Cross-cutting skills form a common foundation for all subjects and include:
crossSkills: ability to express one's opinion orally and in writing
ability to logically justify one's position
initiative and responsibility for one's own learning
teacher.pedagogicalGoal: The goal of my pedagogical work is to create conditions for developing these skills in every student through implementing interactive, competency-oriented technologies that help children learn with joy, make new discoveries, and think independently.
technologies: Interactive learning technologies — pair work, group work, 'Brainstorming', 'Aquarium', 'Circle of Ideas'
Project-based technologies — implementation of mini-projects ('My Family', 'About Me', 'Water is Life', 'My Homeland')
Information and communication technologies — interactive presentations, online quests, educational platforms (LearningApps, Wordwall, Kazka.fun, Kahoot)
Critical thinking technology — techniques 'Cube', 'Fishbone', 'Cinquain', 'Six Thinking Hats'
Game-based technologies — role-play, didactic, interactive games
Technology of developing critical and creative thinking through reading and writing (RWCT)
teachingForms: creation of lapbooks, quests, book trailers
teacher.effectiveness: The implementation of the pedagogical idea for developing cross-cutting skills has shown positive results in educational and upbringing work.
teacher.conclusion:
Developing cross-cutting skills in primary school students is not a separate direction of work, but the foundation of the educational process in the New Ukrainian School.

The application of modern technologies and methods enables every child to realize their potential, learn how to learn, think critically, act creatively and responsibly.

My pedagogical idea is aimed at making every student an active, independent, responsible and happy participant in the educational process, capable of successfully living and learning in our changing world.
teacher.credo: "A teacher is not the one who teaches, but the one from whom we learn."
